name: Fluid Wire Robotics
description: Fluid Wire Robotics develops high-performance force-controllable robotic arms for operations in critical environments. Based on proprietary "Fluid Wire" technology, they enable advanced manipulation in oil & gas facilities, underwater areas, nuclear power plants, mines and clean-rooms.

name: Vitruvian VR
description: Vitruvian VR® simulator is a professional mechanical system with a gyroscopic structure.  The machine uses automation and industrial components combined in a new and innovative way that allow high performances and reactivity suitable for multiple VR experiences such as flight or driving simulations.

name: Dromt
description: Dromt makes controlling commercially avaliable drones and fleets easy by automating the flight plan creation process, data collection and analysis.
